summary: Installer repair implemented with focused and root verification passing. Fresh verifier pass 1 found Caddy blockers; minimal fixes were applied and fresh verifier pass 2 found no blockers.
warnings: pnpm happytg doctor/verify report existing environment warnings unrelated to this repair: Codex websocket fallback, public Mini App route identity mismatch, and already-running local services.
Live Docker endpoint reachability and live Caddy reload were not executed against operator infrastructure; tests use injected command runners/temp files.

findings.message: Repo starter Caddyfile was treated as active system Caddy.
System Caddy snippets could be generated before final port remaps.
Caddy reuse detection did not prove the full route surface.
